feedback.message: Gripper open command completed through the Robotiq action server
Pick preposition plan succeeded; execute it before retrying the local Cartesian pick
Execute command published and fake controller joint state matched the planned final positions
Pick plan succeeded and trajectory feedback was observed
Gripper close command completed through the Robotiq action server

evidence.summary: Verified MoveIt planning-scene attachment of dynamic_1 to tool0

feedback.message: Execute command published and fake controller joint state matched the planned final positions
Planning-scene object is attached to the gripper link and will move with the gripper.
Place plan did not satisfy execution requirements
feedback.correction: Replan with a smaller or safer target, then execute only a successful returned raw.plan_name.

selected_adjustment: front face failed; right face with 0.04m approach produced a valid free preposition
error: unhandled errors in a TaskGroup (1 sub-exception)
post_run_note: Vertical pickup succeeded through attach verification. Place planning returned incomplete path; object was opened/released with direct planning-scene detach and then normalized with the mesh-release translation fix.
